name: modbus-rs-wasm
description: Modbus TCP/RTU/ASCII client & server for the browser, powered by Rust + WebAssembly

scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build ../. --target web --out-name modbus-rs --out-dir wasm/dist/web --features wasm-full
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build ../. --target bundler --out-name modbus-rs --out-dir wasm/dist/bundler --features wasm-full
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:bundler && rm -f dist/web/.gitignore dist/bundler/.gitignore dist/web/package.json dist/bundler/package.json dist/web/README.md dist/bundler/README.md && cp modbus-rs-wasm.d.ts dist/web/modbus-rs.d.ts && cp modbus-rs-wasm.d.ts dist/bundler/modbus-rs.d.ts

author: Raghava-Ch
